calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Continued To Apr-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Hall for (petitioner) Richard Goldman.

Mr. Hall reported that he will be filing a declaration today, that the residuary clause was a failure, that the parties are willing to stipulate to an assignment and requested a continuance to file a noticed amendment. The court requested that the parties get something filed letting the court know that everyone is in agreement regarding the plan. The accounting petition was continued to April 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
